title: ophrys tenthredinifera var. neglecta
intro: Ophrys tenthredinifera var. neglecta, also known as the 'Naples Bee Orchid', is a rare and endangered subspecies of orchid native to southern Europe. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, specifically for its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Ophrys tenthredinifera var. neglecta include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe sore throats and calm irritated skin. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the roots in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to treat various health issues, although its use is largely limited to traditional medicine and further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
